expectations.text: The output creates or proposes a reusable migration script that reads configuration from environment variables.
expectations.evidence: Report says it created copy-seo-title-to-meta-title.mjs and supports env-file/config flags.

expectations.text: The migration defaults to dry-run and requires an explicit execute flag or equivalent for writes.
expectations.evidence: Report says dry-run is default and --execute is required before submitting mutations.

expectations.text: The script builds targeted patches and does not embed tokens or project secrets.
expectations.evidence: Report says no token was printed/copied/saved, uses _rev with ifRevisionID, and writes mutation payload locally.

uncertainties: Potential issue: report says the script defaults to _type == "post", while this repo appears to use blog-article for post-like documents. Human review should compare script contents.
